name: Shifa Taslim Chowdhury
subtitle: Turning data into dignity — 6+ years designing programs, driving research, and building communities across three continents.

paragraphs: I am a development practitioner and researcher with over six years of experience spanning humanitarian response, community safety, higher education, and international development.

My work has taken me from the refugee settlements of Cox's Bazar to university campuses in Denver to community organizations in Seattle — always with the same goal: translating evidence into action that improves lives.
I combine rigorous quantitative and qualitative research skills with program management, stakeholder engagement, and a deep commitment to equity-centered approaches.
